The border crisis. Leaders in both parties have made empty promises about solving this issue, but it's getting worse. In Congress, Will Hurd represented the largest border district and has the experience needed to secure it. This week, Will spent time at our southern border and laid out what needs to be done to fix it. _If you were busy all week, here's what you missed:_

Every single grassroots supporter helps power our mission to elect state Democrats. That's why we’re calling on you to heed this call to action: Here are just a few ways your gift could help expand Democratic power in our statehouses: 1. A gift of $7 could buy 10 new clipboards for organizers 2. A gift of $25 could pay for 1,000 people to see our digital ads 3. A gift of $50 could fund our candidates' phone banks 4. And a gift of$100 could make or break our chances of victory in special elections across the map Every dollar you contribute fuels our efforts to elect state Democrats who will champion fundamental rights like abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, access to affordable health care, and more, paving the way for transformative change in our statehouses. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Remember: The success of our movement depends on every person doing their part. name: =?utf-8?b?4pyP77iPIEV4Y2x1c2l2ZSBMZXR0ZXIgKHZpYSBWUFAp?=
subject: (signature NEEDED) thank President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’ve been handpicked as one of our top supporters!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52366?t=6&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS) **Listen, President Biden has been an INCREDIBLE President and defender of our democracy.** [**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52366?t=7&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52366?t=8&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52366?t=9&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52366?t=10&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=10280%2E878179%2EdDTwSS)

subject: We need real plans for real change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Binkley For President 2024
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=d7f0363ac4&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | | Dear Friend

Real change requires more than just good ideas. I have real plans to **balance the budget** in 7 years, **secure the border** , and **reform healthcare.**(See for yourself [here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=b6ef5afc6c&e=c1403f41d3).)

None of my opponents have real plans to fix these things and **you deserve better. **

I am ready to share my message with the nation at the GOP debate later this month. But I need your help to do it!

**We need to raise $20,000 over Labor Day weekend **to boost our outreach through national media appearances, social media and direct mail.

These are critical components of a presidential campaign, and they carry a hefty price tag.

**Would you consider donating $25, $50 or $100 today?**

We can reach our LDW goal quickly if a few hundred generous supporters donate $100!

But **any amount** you give will make a difference to our **grassroots campaign****.**

If you are tired of the political establishment picking and choosing who gets to **represent real Americans like you** , click below to make a donation today.
---

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Donald Trump made a surprise announcement that left everyone stunned
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 04, 2023

Donald Trump made a
surprise announcement that left everyone stunned
Politics are like a game of
chess. And Trump just declared "check mate."

And Donald Trump made a surprise
announcement that left everyone stunned.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

A top Republican made this
major decision that sent Donald Trump into a fit of rage

The former President
needs plenty of allies on his side if he's to win in 2024. But
lately, that's been easier said than done.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden just spat in the
face of Americans with this despicable act

The Biden presidency
is up in flames. But this action might have poured gasoline on
the fire.
➞ Continue Reading

Top Democrat left
speechless from this striking betrayal

The Democrat Party is
on the brink of a civil war. There's no going back now.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Your America
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22021%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=86NJciccLjjE2QRcqVkOwg&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22022%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l%2fHG4cHKFgVODOjvzwJ3ZA&sysid=1).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22023%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cl4A5m3wjrzdeLUZIVYd5g&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22024%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YB0Hg%2bujxwDyHyF8CKueg&sysid=1) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. **

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22035%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J5bsQ4bRrYaJUTFkBeytyw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

clean_body: The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. | | | | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans? Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. That is why I’m writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zktpijrgg28kptk2euo4jif2thl8t5ftg0t5s8i0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1cph2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0kfa5q2nor4hrnmbmd30drn316nt73m51r41vn0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1cph2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo74aimoebk8sokgq9g1evmmjpfcv7nodn3487qg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1cph2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zab8csvqiud91r1buspq8dk9vvv0niu7t6qa5ii0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1cph2bs)

body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn3kf2sr5ugnfkh8mh422ek2rn09dm4krhrl7a4o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1c3h2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3jpb6op2ipaee2enjic2jaeiojv5lrgi0p41qmg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1cph2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z090qduv756bra8ade3a4vcd7vlkumr7bahuj17o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1cph2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z34uqprsjo0b0nvf01jqum9i55714dh6vogpv83o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1cph2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6p5vjcu6ur68l9qe96oh1keq54gpfviq60o81fo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1cph2bs)
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2dfkkfonjuqd8v8r77ahb4h8k56lh10ftcv5vhg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd46ii2pvmq0jeshmsa956rf4e8cm6o203n0egcg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h68or1c9h2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

body:

But what’s concerning, friend, is **his comments give CDC and NIAID officials the green light to do it all over again.** Everyone’s running around, concerned about this new variant. They’re already talking about another booster. **_How do we know they aren’t going to do another round of mandatory lockdowns and mandate you get the latest jab?_** friend, I’ve set up a **[48-hour fund](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm4clg8arjupfkh21dqq5dqt6a3bn2msig9burfg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj2cth2bs)** to fight back against this unconstitutional power grab. __**[Can I count on you to rush in $20 before midnight to stand with me against these proposed lockdowns and mandates?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2tjtp53engune48sbqfc98stdvuqd7ugpnlgi1g_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj2cth2bs)**__

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Hi, it’s Ann.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
This may be the first time you’ve heard from me in a while, but this is important.

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvo1bd65ph5q240hpb171k60jm0m89eu1qerp4kg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cjh2bs)
---
**[I’m reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbli1g2cpscckh3l5coq69f2pot58dpemktbmog8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cjh2bs)** Before you ask, no: I’m not talking about the Presidential election. I’m not talking about threats from China. I’m not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that’s happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I’m talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You’ve seen what’s happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids’ mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what’s happening in our nation’s schools is an accident. Rather, it’s the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. **The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back.** Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: **This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections.** Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they’ve: ✅**Liberated** MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅**FIRED** 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅**Endorsed** and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. **[But they can’t do this without your help. Could you do me a personal favor and send in a donation of $17.76 or more to help the 1776 Project PAC get brave conservative school board candidates elected nationwide?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvovsl8ookhgv4jcjnhmu7alchgding4763qpddg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cjh2bs)** **Friend****, if p atriots like you and I don’t stand up today, America’s destiny will be determined by a generation who was raised on Critical Race Theory, Radical Gender Ideology, and outright MARXIST ideas.** We cannot let that happen. **[That’s why I’m hoping and praying that you’ll join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC as they fight to take back our schools with a donation of just $17.76 today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0hqen2cv8bsrcdkg569rjipq3f8p1ll3lflmu7o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cjh2bs)** Thank you for taking the time to review this message. God Bless You, Ann Coulter, On Behalf of the 1776 Project PAC

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z14374q9brds2kii9sd0cpdidljvntshlqjohjko_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zohqjqccin980oi41eblbn4jno3dop75rnjomr98_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9da4q8ei3ju5ca1be918aesjpsru711ih28ppp0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zahqgmo8uhft0k6o45jp4fgqikjbv55rtukp5gk8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z06hqrm2du27u48lt686c84h7o5fim40rsu08b10_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl84jdshm33ac5oqpfgvh8u2r563en9mrtfh93qo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z92k27uk7rj2jamok61l5end2j8e2vk1drmlvsgo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z65hknf3i0jcej6a95b7q3revmbq79e8e0bckd58_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrtmv5d636ictmg2u4vmabmlronsfrralbdobng0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj5kvfkn8qjsjm08cjrauejl274vuphg2k5cmg0g_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8dl9v2ciqk07n73dp6p5l7g65l2jmgqo84shlt8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z530lhgnrb2jinoiijepj81rfefnsd2fab3iniig_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs "I need your help â€“ starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znlu8qdd5con8hj4g779ift7fn6d73n8asdqdqn0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9paev2n98r7pfa17f2ftdgb8atd3cv0jc17s8r8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf28atfa4gam8a3kt4gpa2d7ngqilnrhfj582l3o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn0jgi7umjmna5s407hakptha1anjhovcvlakhd0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfghit65b111j44v75n67r7s72ofia82aou3gkj8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0hs3r2ltcqa8krmfqa4d2dinjdm8i2k2o9dba8g_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhcoluibdj67e5hiik157nt176bvnkdp1km98imo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h6aoj6cdh2bs)
---

name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
We can NEVER LET UP in the fight to keep our nation strong and prosperous.
| | | Friend,
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/ec9c2b95beedbdca/641099fa88e31660c3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
As we celebrate Labor Day 2023, I'm reaching out to express my gratitude for the hard work done by generation after generation of Americans to build the greatest nation and strongest economy in the history of the world.

We are a country of dedicated and resilient individuals who are shaping the world’s future.

_**We can NEVER LET UP in the fight to keep America strong and prosperous.**_

I hope everyone enjoys this well-deserved break with their loved ones. We’ve earned it!

\- Troy E. Nehls
---

name: Don Jr.
subject: I’m coming to ask for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Could you complete this crucial survey for me?

Patriot, Don Jr. here.

As a loyal supporter of my father, I'm reaching out on behalf of Senate Republicans _[because they desperately need your help.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqut4emoj3tnfevvmk50pe4vr312gf6pu73s20po_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o74cjh2bs)_

After reviewing your donor profile, I believe you are the right person for this job.

In Quarter 2, Democrats have raised an astronomical amount of money and it appears we are falling behind.
**However, I 'm not asking for money to help out Senate Republicans. [I'm asking for input.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z84hcs3dle9q08f1u1f917dnms2bg82jmmftjuo0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o74cjh2bs)**
Senate Republicans need your help strategizing their next steps. If we strategize correctly, then money won't matter.

I've put together a strategy survey that I need you to complete.

Once you're done, I'll send it over to Senate Republicans.
**Please don't let me down and complete it RIGHT NOW. >>**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdcqms35rdt7jrdqtjd7j1qfmh4be45gj8jpte00_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziifrk2jljd71jgo5oomjeo3t7tokq14973379k8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl0gnsc2ckm03i5j39qqs25ciga2n9vmj1jgr3cg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z09f94c8772o7uo2jch704ppq0e2rqoa88clpt40_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziv2rinrktm894m1d11g8rnpnmdpgthrrgp97lr0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv30fsa2aolajmjm75do0s00sakc3dhq5tin9eno_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America?

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc6ekctrf13qv20h0u8o9q1s9i00uup784suogrg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj3a1g5bslvkc371p949ouha7q89qsvro5rv846o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcp16774j95eac45jtsad2bc2q2rdsuseshac2r8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqr2hlo619n2sc30u8pqgogi4v533cq37bmacan8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpceiq3otokpvshkj1e2saqsegvk750s2jjs5noo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj9pa9aamgp6d7o4nkccqb3v0f7m3asc49mk7nmo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs "I need your help â€“ starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z07epk6s8t4po68dmm8rt5etoouief4dl51evos8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7fc48nhpcdqui4huvm6d2chbt77n1n6dh12ss8g_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf50kcmujlmsp08ar4fk7co67te29isv4fhm3oo0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo6t3d8og7974af1a6haguvpi3qbnkp2r7up81mo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ban6urgj2go30omd3di6u0pq9ejnh8t39ivmig_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfj3g5i752eqp4pu4tte33j0skbja6gh8jip9e28_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlof3o7hqpmhef6ee0c4n317r46nvcdk6kjah2qg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)
---

**By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. [Terms and conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ua85eba9u23c8ehoaovebofqj0jl04157q57h0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs) and [Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdemiaii5p0hkkua3ip4idbq2m8lffga1595esd8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs).apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcjfdke0b83ju866fs5k89v1u1m97v6blvr8aqv8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs). [Terms and conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znkiqskn6n4ku9pd3q0fm3pm9viu1gb5k1r2ehuo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

[Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z31ih6obmpmlqki3sh7fhijotm5kflbs5q6c278o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3h61o76c3h2bs)

subject: President Biden just left a key Democrat fighting for their life
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 04, 2023

President Biden just
left a key Democrat fighting for their life
Joe Biden's disastrous
policies have left leaders across the country begging him for
help. The problem is, that he refuses to answer the call.

And President Biden just left a
key Democrat fighting for their life.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Donald Trump made a
surprise announcement that left everyone stunned

Politics are like a
game of chess. And Trump just declared "check mate."
➞ Continue Reading

A top Republican made this
major decision that sent Donald Trump into a fit of rage

The former President
needs plenty of allies on his side if he's to win in 2024. But
lately, that's been easier said than done.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden just spat in the
face of Americans with this despicable act

The Biden presidency
is up in flames. But this action might have poured gasoline on
the fire.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Kathryn Cantwell
subject: Tomorrow night?
body:
Good morning, what a gorgeous Rhode Island Day and thank you to everyone who is dropping flyers and making phone calls for our message.

First, and important when we have been working hard, will you be able to join us at Incred-A-Bowl tomorrow night at 8 in East Providence? I know Walter would love to see you!

Second, if you have not, I am sending this link out to all of our supporters who may be working to make sure you double check your polling location. <https://vote.sos.ri.gov/Home/PollingPlaces?ActiveFlag=2>

\--

Best,
**Kate Cantwell, MPA**
_Campaign Manager_
401.447.0346
Berbrick for Congress
Rhode Island's First Congressional District
[**www.walterberbrick.com**](http://www.walterberbrick.com/)
**[Make a Donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/berbrick-for-congress-1) **
**
**

[Medal of Honor Monday: Marine Corps Sgt. Lawrence Peters](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqiluof7u3tl3atj5kjipf8a8pn37rku5lq9quu0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f834sug62pt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumir8cjkmeqjb9hnm9o7ctd6esonb8dk6tp7actm6kqq0t9hekp7ctt246h22sh2s8i66p76c3j64ob2clh2bs)
When you're in charge during battle, you do whatever you can to keep your comrades safe. Marine Corps Sgt. Lawrence David Peters led a squad of men as they fought their way out of a firefight in Vietnam. He didn't survive the ordeal, but his grace, leadership and bravery earned him the Medal of Honor.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ik7qk6hcg90vf1ed88jb7n7pm25k6l2ovdtgko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f834sug62pt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumir8cjkmeqjb9hnm9o7ctd6esonb8dk6tp7actm6kqq0t9hekp7ctt246h22sh2s8i66p76c3j64ob2clh2bs)

body:
This may be the first time you’ve heard from me in a while, but this is important.

| | | Friend, this is Ann Coulter.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziqsff1uahodskns80kt8llq4q3n5elubmf2e6tg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3j64ob2cdh2bs)

**[I’m reaching out to you today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help me fight back. ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7s5h5pnllakdjr62qpku12jgur16e5relntva4g_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3j64ob2cdh2bs)** Before you ask, no: I’m not talking about the Presidential election. I’m not talking about threats from China. I’m not even talking about Joe Biden or the madhouse that’s happening in Washington, D.C.. **_I’m talking about the all out assault that the radical left is waging against parents and students across the country._** You’ve seen what’s happening in our schools. Parents are being lied to by teachers, investigated by the FBI for protesting at school board meetings, and shut out of crucial conversations about their kids’ mental health. Explicit pornographic material is being handed to students in school libraries. Critical Race Theory and hardcore marxist ideologies are being taught as the gospel to children K-12. Test scores are plummeting nationwide as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” And in some extreme circumstances, minors are being groomed to become transgender and rebel against their Christian upbringing... And all of this is happening in secret, behind the backs of parents. Friend, none of what’s happening in our nation’s schools is an accident. Rather, it’s the consequence of a 30 year long campaign from leftist billionaires like George Soros designed to infiltrate our education system from the ground up. **The good news is that, for the first time EVER, patriots like you and I have a way to fight back.** Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC: **This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what Soros and Company have been doing for decades by influencing local school board elections.** Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is. Since they were founded a little over 2 years ago, they’ve: ✅**Liberated** MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards ✅**FIRED** 132 radical left wing school board members across the country ✅**Endorsed** and developed rock solid plan to support over 100 MORE conservative school boards candidates THIS November, 2023 Point blank: No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing. **[But they can’t do this without your help. Could you do me a personal favor and send in a donation of $17.76 or more to help the 1776 Project PAC get brave conservative school board candidates elected nationwide?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zldv783aa08351iqitm85b84lsmq374879coj42o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3j64ob2cdh2bs)** **Friend****, if p atriots like you and I don’t stand up today, America’s destiny will be determined by a generation who was raised on Critical Race Theory, Radical Gender Ideology, and outright MARXIST ideas.** We cannot let that happen. **[That’s why I’m hoping and praying that you’ll join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC as they fight to take back our schools with a donation of just $17.76 today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z584adofi8ovu2g6knlvbc0g5fc2ion7bi23ohag_rp22sh2s8i66p76c3j64ob2cdh2bs)** Thank you for taking the time to review this message. God Bless You, Ann Coulter, On Behalf of the 1776 Project PAC

name: The Flyover
subject: Burning Man Traps 70,000, McCartney Wants His Bass Back, and World’s Cutest Rescue Dog
body:
Up to 70,000 people were trapped at the Burning Man psychedelic arts festival on Sunday, hemmed in by heavy rains and deep mud and unable to get back out of the flooded desert location.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

| | |
# MONday, SEPT. 4, 2023
---|---
**Good morning and Happy Labor Day!** On this date in 1888, George Eastman patented the first roll-film camera, the original Kodak. It came with rolled film, 100 shots per roll, which you mailed back to the factory for your prints. [Here's the design](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngc0WcPkJA0MXb-na0SL4Et8KGwujWHn7qp27Hx3p-7rP90iF9udn3DD0XOeYOr1wFn7Qg4JZ8SVkRIXAMUjr4aacvjm-BjApg5EJhEzWo3T48GC1cQ5jMhY4BSUUCC-08MZIMyYAmdELnbVOD-uZFrhQr238rrT3FXN51xe2MdWNl7D2fpwMPpiamJqu6xrr3lc6l_j-LZiajrX2ejI1tVrKkKlsQ4obtshbWI6LSqHTOqbFc4tU_rb9X-RPAAAA__-IFlMn).
Today in _The Rotator_ , we're getting you ready for the week ahead, including the official first day of one of America's favorite seasons: pro football! The NFL returns Thursday night. ## Burning Man Washes Out, Trapping 70,000
Up to 70,000 people were [trapped at the Burning Man](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQRb9G6vAgQAgKite482tTalbLYm8GgQcRe_L3GaVOee9pzpyP23oDzlzu_2Gn0FNdATu_aJVeGKH0qsYYEpEiPVKYrNdOLcYt4yNYA2QtgPfg3WbUvABKcmS128ym9chBSaWll0b6eZ7mC2o9JfLSJGNws34wkiL32i6flUt_UMrf9UXtgnUfc3j0_jwG_W9Q10Fd4VnofZzoHK0zZhrUdftqhctd7FBEoqPzC7JIudZ4vlR6g4IkMNeDoogWo3NEUnq0NCUbVfRq0Z5wQpjc2EJ8vjlnPuwyGHnfgfOvTv8zzk8AAAD__yiaZbw) psychedelic arts festival on Sunday, hemmed in by heavy rains and deep mud and unable to get back out of the flooded desert location. Authorities are investigating at least [one death at the festival](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuxCAURL8Gd7bwBdtQUKSh27QpLYwvayIeK2DX2b-PnDrNaKSR5kjn67bejA8-3T9NRNVcXo1t_oUrlT3vga3Q7cohArIO1ThLJmDhYukOJWZphJgWIybDjN3MPI7LzEaJm7Buop1XQIFRSTmV0zROg2VsdCgpd5zbbZaEU9x9y2X4zj61A1145xeWwebYBXW09qiEfRDQBPR5noNN6doI6OuZgKbyiqs9KwG9PUvy6d5Hk_racom1rweGhqWvz7SbNwHt044_w9Fi6IraH6cPwdd5IZzeo_Hhj93-NfEbAAD__6T5Xgk) this weekend while asking the attendees to shelter in place until conditions clear. More rain was expected for Sunday. A few people managed to escape, including comedian Chris Rock and DJ Diplo, who hitchhiked a ride in the back of a pickup truck after walking for miles. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OpDAQhJ_GZD0ybfPjwMElZHPphciYNvSNwch4ZnbefsXGm5RKKqn06ft3H--OI-_LX7eRLSGNzhd-0SgNaEA1YjXbQISkKrJ1a1SPne67arXeuNAaTa6WvseAqnc4tQ0G1XYae1-xRYlKGqmlaZq6uXml6kBG6qC1n1ojtKSZS8q3_4n3slKIn_SifPNpq6JdSzlOof4IHAQOh1vo5K9rEzhczwIHaa642sxHTODXzCfk5B-Q6fRPmiHktMH0zDvvC2xuhxBTmk-YPhDcDi4UytDCxpHg7eJD4FBlOx9vjpHPthNaLpvj-ANVflX0HQAA__938Wa4))
## Back-to-School Spending Hits Record High
Back-to-school spending for clothing and supplies is set to hit [a record high of over $135 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2u4yAUhJ8Gd8cCjH8oKLZxd7fd0sJwMCTYWEBi5e1XTn2bkUajkT59_36WHx1iOLa_ekdVXVq0qeGNC5UggHcLb6xyiBy7BhUbZDfxUUxj49VqtaDO0pEyxpyeJrfqtR9HjY4bNrAmKE55RyUVVPY961vTdcyhpMIJYdZBEkHRhppy-0jhqB5d_KQ35takvYnK13oW0v0hfCZ8vq6rzfiqmMu9Ez7vOj-xFsLn1x2PlGsBE1FnWLV5nto8C7zKt0BNUIxPKUI58bDh2MCHChlNyhZ82DxUHwp87vvNDVQCZYTPTVb2vEKMoQwjEXTbdYhfxPqrsP8BAAD__z6cbaU) in 2023, with shopping running longer and later into the season. The National Retail Federation estimates that families with grade-school children will spend an average of [$890 per household](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGvozAQBOBfYzojs7YDFC6uocu1VyKzrIMvDhthC1_-_enx2teN9E0xmj_3-e5jivvjt3-RK4FnjyWeNKtRGgl6hmZ1gQhIN-S626gH6M3QN5vrFXUBUQ-abB_s4q0iuwAOympNAZroQIFWozJqtLazLWrdBRqVCcbgchuFUbTGwkf7l-NeNgrpwycdLfKrSW4r5Z2F_iVgEjDVWltc8k41f7mAaaf64eP5nbKAafH4lIVlxo05SeRcsqR_b8JC6wXsD1m2mGUmn3m_8CjSr2dEkrzLjetV9CcJmJrDre8aU4r51gujHi8f07Wu_PjV_wAAAP__NpxtnQ), up about 2.5% from last year, mainly from inflation. In a sign of the times, retailers say one of the most popular items this year is [see-through backpacks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2u4yAUhJ8Gd8cCjH8oKLZxd7fd0sJwMCTYWEBi5e1XTn2bkUajkT59_36WHx1iOLa_ekdVXVq0qeGNC5UggHcLb6xyiBy7BhUbZDfxUUxj49VqtaDO0pEyxpyeJrfqtR9HjY4bNrAmKE55RyUVVPY961vTdcyhpMIJYdZBEkHRhppy-0jhqB5d_KQ35takvYnK13oW0v0hfCZ8vq6rzfiqmMu9Ez7vOj-xFsLn1x2PlGsBE1FnWLV5nto8C7zKt0BNUIxPKUI58bDh2MCHChlNyhZ82DxUHwp87vvNDVQCZYTPTVb2vEKMoQwjEXTbdYhfxPqrsP8BAAD__z6cbaU) that enable students to move through school security checkpoints more easily.
## Jimmy Buffett Dies at 76
Jimmy Buffett, the enormously [popular singer and entrepreneur](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LturDAQgOGngW6Q8YVLQXEauj1tSmTsMczGmBWehfD2UVKn_ptf38djeliKlJb_dsOBwz5Zx3TiJHrQINUkSz8ERImqxKFuetXJVndtuQ7OOFSdNxr7tvV147pZKiOVCaaVqOqSBimkEr3QojemNpVTqg7YCx20dnPTF1qgJ96P6rlT4hVDvPcTj8rtWxmHlfmVC_WvkGMhx-u6qrB_JbzyTy_kiInxYEtpw8SFHCMumLw9btjemRzZBE_athvmdwjIDB6th7aBSCd6WClDpIAQ6RMh72kBpggnHjdEmxnmAy2v5TH410UxUm7aQotlsxR_D_lPr-8AAAD__8jkb0k), died at age 76 of skin cancer, having built a legacy of easygoing songs and an entertainment empire that catered to his devoted "Parrothead" followers. Buffett first came to fame as the singer/songwriter of such Caribbean-flavored hits as "[Margaritaville](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1rwzAQQH-NtMUod_KHBg2F1pu7FroYWTrFKnIU7LNN_n1J567vwYP3NYyDSzndb59uIcuxjM5zOmhU5qIvgCPIYCMREEqy18ZgB63uWjnb6BXUzgN0ETGYyYfosQnNBErH0HUyWVCAyiitTF1f68ojXiMZpaPWfmqM0IpC4rJWPyXdeaaYn-WgtfJlkdnOzI9N4JuAXkB_nmf1LDvvE738izj2s8D-EPg-fO_Y-o318SFXGx5nyjltTSu0ui0u5b8k_zv4GwAA__-bTVFy)," "[Cheeseburger in Paradise](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFr8zAQQH-NtMWcTic7GjR8H8XQIaVTC12MLJ9jpXIUbMUm_76kc9f34MH7PHUnH1O8nt_8zK6MufOhxI07sAc6oO5QDm5kRtaSnaqtPmJDx0ZOjgGJauwJyNheqdDQUJsAdrAeTdPL6BBQgwUCa4wyVdBajWyBRqLQ11YQ8BBLXqpLjtcy8ZgeeeOlCnmWyU2l3Fah_wlsBbb7vlePfC_3np_-SXwJk9DtJvTL5f_6_vWh6PXwLRc33PaYUlzrRhCcZx_Tb7L8OfgTAAD__7BTT_I)," and "Changes in Latitudes, Changes in Attitude," music that deeply touched millions of fans. Later in life, he transformed the Margaritaville theme into restaurants, resorts, clothing, and footwear brands, among other products. Though Buffett's brand was about the easygoing sailing life, [he's reported to have died a billionaire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwjAUAH9NsgXZ7yOJBw9d2OjaMXLsZ3jIISgYUP59ReeOpxtOup_TdApa9Hb-Dov4mtcpxKovmYzrqAOcoE0-i4BgK972DkcYaBzai7eBLcdZ7IAhjaMLMVuLEJPlODpjW_VgAI0zZByz5UNEtFmcoUwU5941ZCRpXbfDddVbvUgu-_qS7RDXpS3-Uuv90eBXA8cGjuF-k_fjoz6wVY1FGjius9Zn2Pbuqsuyd_MzZ6m1I3CckXlGBzhkMn2PiUaOFPvEPLSbT_e3lqKPfmjInJeg5a9b_73wGwAA__-ELVuu).

clean_body: Up to 70,000 people were trapped at the Burning Man psychedelic arts festival on Sunday, hemmed in by heavy rains and deep mud and unable to get back out of the flooded desert location. | | | | | | MONday, SEPT. 4, 2023 ---|--- Good morning and Happy Labor Day! On this date in 1888, George Eastman patented the first roll-film camera, the original Kodak. It came with rolled film, 100 shots per roll, which you mailed back to the factory for your prints. . Today in The Rotator , we're getting you ready for the week ahead, including the official first day of one of America's favorite seasons: pro football! The NFL returns Thursday night. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to consider contributing to our . | Burning Man Washes Out, Trapping 70,000 Up to 70,000 people were psychedelic arts festival on Sunday, hemmed in by heavy rains and deep mud and unable to get back out of the flooded desert location. Authorities are investigating at least this weekend while asking the attendees to shelter in place until conditions clear. More rain was expected for Sunday. A few people managed to escape, including comedian Chris Rock and DJ Diplo, who hitchhiked a ride in the back of a pickup truck after walking for miles. () Back-to-School Spending Hits Record High Back-to-school spending for clothing and supplies is set to hit in 2023, with shopping running longer and later into the season. The National Retail Federation estimates that families with grade-school children will spend an average of , up about 2.5% from last year, mainly from inflation. In a sign of the times, retailers say one of the most popular items this year is that enable students to move through school security checkpoints more easily. Jimmy Buffett Dies at 76 Jimmy Buffett, the enormously , died at age 76 of skin cancer, having built a legacy of easygoing songs and an entertainment empire that catered to his devoted "Parrothead" followers. Buffett first came to fame as the singer/songwriter of such Caribbean-flavored hits as "," "," and "Changes in Latitudes, Changes in Attitude," music that deeply touched millions of fans. Later in life, he transformed the Margaritaville theme into restaurants, resorts, clothing, and footwear brands, among other products. Though Buffett's brand was about the easygoing sailing life, . Ron DeSantis didn't join him. Instead, Sen. Rick Scott, a former Florida governor, stood with the President. ()➤Meanwhile, a Florida judge told the state legislature to draw a new redistricting map, throwing out the one pushed by Gov. DeSantis. The judge said the plan violated the state constitution by diminishing the clout of Black voters. ()➤ Nikki Haley revived her call for term limits and mental competency tests for older politicians, pointing to Sen. Mitch McConnell, Sen. Dianne Feinstein, and Rep. Nancy Pelosi as examples. ()➤ A federal appeals court allowed a lawsuit to continue against the Food and Drug Administration over its lobbying efforts to stop the use of ivermectin in Covid cases. The lawsuit claims the FDA exceeded its authority. () Thanks for all your support. Without loyal readers like you, we wouldn't be able to push out this great content every day. body:
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f92dc4ac0ab543369cc1423c76bf67e2&_e=yTnLnjDEBOKej0eqQZNPrpKxtiv6Sf-Wj8CRJX0HKHoX722Xq3EB89fd1hfqug05IpEkstftS5KucTpLNTRJQLtFiL2MTEDGLv5sOVzt01EmoclwuUMM2z9SNqV_iqWHHNBMgyNx4qlXN_KI329YanHG2F6ob-9s9h2DzEo-UbsP36Syr5Bw_Nwkd94II1S9Dgqo0YysnVtkGmgHuZQOpwc2NbxV5diC16pX5Mt-6fBbEYksZOF114xN7nngft-VRYNFEO0rTpc8Ji2N4ZP1J9of-V-s6i18xS2Q8rhRGddvD2o6Z5oedvtWciuouvFSKjGrUvgbq0uDsDpYAiyTuprtMwwm_ZMcACfyNKuxJlbJSm79vT1h0FysmGVQikdQ2UbXuYrUwE4VCTk0AGdxPYNO4UoAq9OKhIbz1QIwMYl34weeUHSxAV0ZtlbgD6Cv "STAND WITH RYAN")

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91ce30eb804f4911ae3903e8f8707d89&_e=nM0vzlhOmzIKHSYktYtH-8CUly7HXiqC9IOo13H_a9Kg7U7Rj6vWfojWFZhgc4bEjTKUq9VB5fPdQ7gNouVURU0YPA5R35HSZ-_g3MoNflyDnc-fqrmH8V6ulsjFuYqjareusZSpKuPW5YQgfmk-R6BbSkvLaJBiM6o2APD-p7KbSGH8F8ncgDwqocUbF08lHqyTqiURDsEDDj9wi6ZXxS9TMUhg0_22NVsMB8JgC-HyyUxsrpvu7Vmgn-SeMJCcNVI24QFhAwHGSmLJefvupWPfsUzzZykKJTu5jiJwfujwrD4ISBc8qrEKUugxicHd_3cMibvSCIaIy-QTlGWhdQ8nvX1QH9CPKYU1yR1MboQsgbfdIy4ZsRzaCSRLeVOjrkhgi2dVbrqIF1zRYHISUCYrnWE5do3GBMA4gz-LeFOYQ24vlGf8SWePum7kvUjdi-9dHZ6YxA5lNyAdJQDgkw%3D%3D "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

But here 's the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. We want to earn your support, and we’ll send you exactly what you need when you join our investor team.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=df885481acd546c33da7f8e2b2e8847a9f27f493a901a9dc1a73ac99fbfb55adf32fe71bc8926436fd5a331611771b87b29a5c688dd927971559167050ba1c63
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=74731834ea6bf27ca3742665c381da6ea451b9a2f290459f321b7f8befa8e39bc9904a7035fbb0e88b2006090b0d1def80fbd9690cb4de3422731e0e43f58fd4

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.
