After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Happy Labor Day!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=01e7da5030b34140938046b10a3a8e16&_e=2b_j7-Tue0TvUSOCd39Qxil6UnRz9vc0eT0RFuXPcFXh-NG7ygCaz-ZvTiYz9tonJkaYc72WgzSf60daCAlR9C2Lr71WoFCezUlxUVbkaUxVLRXPC5DaKYiggWKE8nMinH46G1AcnTJp8aXJi35bSiwICgt6l-cfYr8lJyXUTto8CcjJ7CWRxCMWfzQcN6eHx2W49lgoCA_stMbJvc2jag%3D%3D)
---
My friend, This Labor Day, I hope you will join me in taking time to think about the hard-working Americans who built our country and those, like you, who continue to build it today. While we are forever in debt to those like George Washington and Benjamin Franklin who founded this nation, we must also remember the millions of average Americans who worked tirelessly – inside and outside the home – to earn a living, care for their family and to create the country we love. For me, Labor Day is recognition that the conservative principles of hard work, individual liberty and personal responsibility get results. They work every time. As your member of Congress, I will always fight to protect hard-working Wisconsinites so that they can live the life they deserve. Wishing you a Happy Labor Day with your loved ones, \- Glenn Grothman
---

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Vote In-Person
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Do you trust the mail?
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HzSSZpSk4Pi8orLW-IeAvdIhL6WGA3YYigdJrsY9gJEa_tHKI4sRsP6zW_2WevnyupCvgRyiJVNJS2wX60JRc3KVrNGGlp_QaiG6pVAyNdr8oMdTj4FJl2LHbGAYb3TGqhsr9NvnKx9zTtFP8ZiYjBc625tysJO-v4NpRbSUdjo=&c=c0ZP6U1yfaz2MD5tb3AfZsnkiyqn9GjgZgAz54UfylY0jwqEfLD9VA==&ch=5aP1DKpIT0vEsBarku-nTMu7TcyPsBNER2SvkVAt4c3SC8hPx4CkVQ==)
---
| Secure Your Vote By Voting In-Person
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

The best way to secure your vote is to cast your ballot in-person, and on Election Day.

Take a look at this story on mail theft from WRIC in Richmond- [Stealing mail is a federal crime, but thieves continue to strike Central Virginia](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HzSSZpSk4Pi8orLW-IeAvdIhL6WGA3YYigdJrsY9gJEa_tHKI4sRsLNHCNsBb6Q5cHjttYYbVQOXbsvbMwRLlxk1K2mJqhoOyzJhaG-bD5ntFqskobGK9eM2emsg8pcAaeEjiRW5CUoMVY3cT7g3Bf_LYk2wETorLhmEK2MLxYAe0Kv0a6K964wqtltyKBQg115bS1wjPACt9FZ36K-jSqKDIl_lalRkHYNCLkCwF-MOLPC632PRtWSNf_aJ8U2JMk7ZWwQz--W_p-Y6Gnsij7OVh97h7oO5i7V0MRE_H0GGh6fnIDW5jBelCOr6HROPmrBUMwxGrcsqu5i-ecQj0pwNrHYo1owR9PPEDdKv2LRag5fCdGtupgvi6VzhfhEulw4ZJ9DdKes=&c=c0ZP6U1yfaz2MD5tb3AfZsnkiyqn9GjgZgAz54UfylY0jwqEfLD9VA==&ch=5aP1DKpIT0vEsBarku-nTMu7TcyPsBNER2SvkVAt4c3SC8hPx4CkVQ==)

The article says, "These two incidents are part of a concerning nationwide trend of mail and mail carrier thefts, which is a federal crime. Thieves are often looking for uncashed checks, gifts, and personal information that could make identity theft easier."

Voting information would be included in that target as it is personal information, including your signature, "that could make identity theft easier." This is concerning.

The best way to make sure your vote will be counted is to show up on Election Day and cast a paper ballot. I've been working hard to make that the law here in the Commonwealth. Unfortunately, a Democrat-controlled legislature has undone some important safeguards, but we won't stop the fight for election integrity.

And join us tomorrow evening, Tuesday, Sept. 5, for the Chesterfield VA Tea Party. We'll be at Great American Ranch in Midlothian. We hope to see you there.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

clean_body: Do you trust the mail? | | | | == | Secure Your Vote By Voting In-Person | | | ---|--- Dear Friends, The best way to secure your vote is to cast your ballot in-person, and on Election Day. Take a look at this story on mail theft from WRIC in Richmond- == The article says, "These two incidents are part of a concerning nationwide trend of mail and mail carrier thefts, which is a federal crime. Thieves are often looking for uncashed checks, gifts, and personal information that could make identity theft easier." Voting information would be included in that target as it is personal information, including your signature, "that could make identity theft easier." This is concerning. The best way to make sure your vote will be counted is to show up on Election Day and cast a paper ballot. I've been working hard to make that the law here in the Commonwealth. Unfortunately, a Democrat-controlled legislature has undone some important safeguards, but we won't stop the fight for election integrity. And join us tomorrow evening, Tuesday, Sept. 5, for the Chesterfield VA Tea Party. We'll be at Great American Ranch in Midlothian. We hope to see you there. For God & Country, Amanda Chase | | Upcoming Event | | | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | == Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by == ==

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Restore rolled back environmental protections
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964521?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Somewhere in America – maybe in a community near you – **babies are breathing toxins** from nearby coal plants. School buses full of **children drive by towering smokestacks** and grimy fossil fuel refineries. Seniors are unknowingly **drinking contaminated water. ** Wealthy fossil fuel executives don’t site these dirty projects where they live. But **everyday people don’t always have the option to say “no.”** The National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) is meant to give us a say in whether polluting projects end up in our communities – but **this law’s most critical protections were rolled back in 2020!** President Biden is updating NEPA rules now, so we need YOUR help to make sure he restores these important regulations. [**Tell President Biden to repair our bedrock environmental protections and fight toxic pollution in our communities! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964522?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964523?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The polluting projects that NEPA is supposed to protect us from have real, sometimes _**life-or-death consequences, Friend.**_ Pollution from fossil fuels has been linked to **foul odors, SPLITTING headaches, asthma** , and even **increased CANCER rates!**
We need President Biden to ensure NEPA is as strong as possible and that it protects you, me, and our neighbors from corporate fossil fuel greed. But it will take environmentalists like you speaking out to make it happen. [**Please, Friend, take just 30 seconds to help restore one of our nation’s MOST CRITICAL environmental laws! We need 2,283 more signatures by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964524?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1964523?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Hallie Templeton
Legal Director & Senior Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

No coincidence. Peter, The Democrats released their list of their Top 2024 GOP Targets, and on that list, they included 2 Navy veterans and 2 Korean-American immigrants. That’s right. The Democrats are targeting us. The “Flippable Four” conservatives: Jen Kiggans (Navy Veteran) Brandon Williams (Navy Veteran) Young Kim (First Generation Immigrant) Michelle Steel (First Generation Immigrant) https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=17133763907e5b2ee2dbacacb446c0bbd88b2e5ea83202446e04de15f441bd4260daad67d08faaa48260576c1a5bb65e38af741848defc7470c60ef71ac08c81 SPLIT A DONATION >> Each of us knows that America is the greatest country in the world. Take a look at our experiences: https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=17133763907e5b2ee2dbacacb446c0bbd88b2e5ea83202446e04de15f441bd4260daad67d08faaa48260576c1a5bb65e38af741848defc7470c60ef71ac08c81 Jen Kiggans and Brandon Williams served our country. Jen Kiggans isn’t just a Navy veteran herself, she’s married to a retired F-18 pilot and is now a Navy mom, too. Brandon Williams is the first Navy Nuclear Submarine Officer serving in Congress in 50+ years. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=17133763907e5b2ee2dbacacb446c0bbd88b2e5ea83202446e04de15f441bd4260daad67d08faaa48260576c1a5bb65e38af741848defc7470c60ef71ac08c81 Young Kim and Michelle Steel immigrated here from South Korea in pursuit of the American Dream. body:
Mark's Monday Memo
| | | |
---
# The Significance of Work and the Pitfalls of Idleness: A Labor Day Message
---
This Labor Day, we recognize and honor those who get up every morning and head to work. Work is ennobling, while idleness robs one of dignity and self-worth.
Work is a crucial pillar in the structure of our society, offering more than just financial gain. Work provides a sense of accomplishment and purpose, distinguishing it from mere idleness.
Martin Luther King Jr. emphasized, "All labor that uplifts humanity has dignity and importance and should be undertaken with painstaking excellence." Working, whether building, serving others, doing manual labor, creating new technologies, or any other job, contributes to personal growth, self-esteem, and societal advancement.
Idleness poses a contrasting challenge. In the words of Thomas Edison, "Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work." It's essential to realize that excessive idleness can lead to negative consequences. Inactivity can lead to a loss of purpose, hinder personal growth, and negatively impact communities.
Dependence on welfare or sustained idleness can hamper one's potential to excel, limiting individual growth and self-worth. We should not pay able-bodied people not to work - it is harmful to them.
In conclusion, work carries intrinsic value and offers a pathway to growth, collaboration, and progress. The cautionary tales of idleness remind us that active engagement with work is essential for personal development, self-worth, and the betterment of society.
As your Representative in Congress, I will honor those who work by doing all that I can to reduce the burden of taxes and government regulations. I will also fight to reform our welfare system so that it rewards and encourages able-bodied people to work and stops giving money to people who enter our country illegally.
---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: Briefly tell me your qualifications to serve in Congress. -D.B. A. First, I care about people. I want to serve the people of Nevada's First Congressional District by doing all I can to make government work for them. If your Social Security check is incorrect--call me. If your veteran benefits are delayed--call me. If the post office isn't doing its job--call me. Second, I have deep ties to our community. Lesly and I raised our children here. I owned a business here, helping people with their financial needs. I taught at UNLV and in our schools. I was a leader in our church and our community. Third, I served our country for 30 years as a member of the military. I enlisted as a Private and retired as a Colonel. I deployed to ten foreign countries, including combat zones in Afghanistan, Iraq, and Kuwait, and in support of operations in Syria. Fourth, I have a degree in finance and an MBA. I know how the economy works, and I know how to balance a budget to tame inflation. Q. Many politicians stay in their ivory towers and are not accessible to ordinary people. Are you like that? -T.D. A. I'm committed to remaining accessible to the people of my district. Here is a [link to my personal calendar](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F2ikptUg-G9dOiNUaHniE0uoJKCF5SUWIcrQdLUQCCBOXHUBCjyrqoiHCUVxDBP-uSzoJVD2cj6LUN-IuDl-_05MXTcmqcOq9-0dUKSzy65P4PLYI8Y1eTXWf-LUawBJGvrfgGsmF2bLE3ph9CSr2xXVS4jtJKZnY9E2gLnbo-wqFxLnYnwb0_0_FzjY19txRvt5C6UTFJk=&c=m-t3xRxPuLss5s5eNBzTIveQSLAx4euyhb0zEhcwGE-KL77GBEyCIw==&ch=dBUZIcDgAdnSJpYD7OLoz0hy2O22zeJEgA4gY7BzXLI1_8drylyjpQ==). Feel free to schedule a phone call with me. You can tell me about the issues that are most important to you, and you can ask me any question you like.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---
| [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F2ikptUg-G9dOiNUaHniE0uoJKCF5SUWIcrQdLUQCCBOXHUBCjyrqkmIxz4Ebcs1doaoXE88Eq_BOd-k7Flbp_vL90le_Yhk0dSrrY2e371TAocMXG25SWGDOmBmfMy0q243NAXhCKcA4_r55IiAcI226cdOePwQ&c=m-t3xRxPuLss5s5eNBzTIveQSLAx4euyhb0zEhcwGE-KL77GBEyCIw==&ch=dBUZIcDgAdnSJpYD7OLoz0hy2O22zeJEgA4gY7BzXLI1_8drylyjpQ==)

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Massachusetts’ Governor makes a surprising decision that leaves many Democrats speechless
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 04, 2023

Massachusetts'
Governor makes a surprising decision that leaves many Democrats
speechless
The state of Massachusetts
seems to be in a state of panic. Many are wondering what will
happen next.

And the Massachusetts Governor
has made a decision that left many Democrats shocked.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

President Biden just left a
key Democrat fighting for their life

Joe Biden's
disastrous policies have left leaders across the country begging
him for help. The problem is, that he refuses to answer the call.
➞ Continue Reading

Donald Trump made a
surprise announcement that left everyone stunned

Politics are like a
game of chess. And Trump just declared "check mate."
➞ Continue Reading

A top Republican made this
major decision that sent Donald Trump into a fit of rage

The former President
needs plenty of allies on his side if he's to win in 2024. But
lately, that's been easier said than done.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

The national media is paying more and more attention to our race every day. Last week, POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401] reported that Democrats "are entertaining a once-unlikely prospect: retaking the House majority by winning in the South."
The story specifically highlighted the SC-01 racial gerrymandering case that will soon come before the Supreme Court [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181780/-My-swing-district-has-its-date-before-the-Supreme-Court] .
Per POLITICO: "It's impossible to know how many seats could become competitive, but the party is hoping a handful may come into play and that new maps could even threaten the likes of ... Nancy Mace."
https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/ [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/] ran a story explaining how new congressional maps "could be drawn in time to change the electoral landscape in 2024, when Democrats need a net gain of just five seats to take control of the House."
According to Roll Call, the SC-01 Supreme Court case "may also impact the federal redistricting litigation in Florida, which involves similar racial gerrymandering claims."
https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/ [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
And back home in the Lowcountry, the Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/] published an editorial calling on the Supreme Court to redraw the lines of SC-01 — so that the map "reflects the true electoral nature of our lower coast, not a district that the GOP bleached by moving thousands of Black voters to other districts."
On the picket line
https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers]
Union of Southern Service Workers [https://ussw.org/]
Michael expressed solidarity with the workers of the Waffle House on Garners Ferry Road in Columbia, South Carolina, who began a three-day strike [https://twitter.com/RaiseUptheSouth/status/1677737443145949184] on this month after delivering to management their petition to organize.
As a business executive with nearly four decades of private sector experience — including several years as a leader in South Carolina's food industry — Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout any organization deserve fair pay and safe working conditions.
https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/ [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Holy City Sinner [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Michael steadfastly stands behind the striking Waffle House staff as they seek sensible concessions from management and strive for a better quality of life for restaurant workers in South Carolina.
He also urged Nancy Mace — who often mentions her past experience as a Waffle House waitress [https://twitter.com/NancyMace/status/1451926458994151427?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1451926458994151427%7Ctwgr%5Eb80d1ca7caee292360b8edb17aecebf62c52def8%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fstories%2F2023%2F7%2F25%2F2183281%2F-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers] on the campaign trail — to similarly endorse the demands of those on strike.
In the arena
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486]
Rep. Nancy Mace [https://twitter.com/RepNancyMace/status/1684928879235072000?s=20]
Nancy Mace attended a POLITICO event [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486] last week, where she warned that Republicans need to refocus on "child care, maternal care, prenatal care [and] abortion" if they want to keep control of the House.
It was more cheap talk from Mace, who — time and again — has flip-flopped on the issues that matter most to women and working families.
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid= [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
The Guardian [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans]
Here are the facts:
*
In
2019,
Nancy
Mace
voted
for
a
six-week
abortion
ban
[https://www.scstatehouse.gov/votehistory.php?KEY=16575]
in
the
South
Carolina
legislature.
*
In
2021,
she
voted
against
the
expansion
of
the
child

credit
[https://mace.house.gov/media/press-releases/mace-so-called-american-rescue-plan-was-never-about-covid-19-relief]
in
the
American
Rescue
Plan.
*
In
January,
she
co-sponsored
H.R.
7
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/5/2179435/-My-opponent-is-co-sponsoring-another-extreme-bill]
,
which
would
make
health
coverage
that
includes
reproductive
care
ineligible
for
federal

*
In
July,
she
voted
for
an
NDAA
amendment
that
makes
it
harder
for
servicewomen
to
access

[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181768/-Nancy-Mace-called-it-an-asshole-move-Then-she-voted-for-it]
—
a
policy
she
herself
called

Nothing about Nancy Mace's record is pro-children or pro-women. She should stop pretending otherwise.
On social media
https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore]
Michael surpassed 6,600 Twitter followers [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore] this week! Can you help us reach 7,500 followers before the end of the month?
And if you aren't already, make sure to keep up with our campaign on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/] , Threads [https://www.threads.net/@mbm_sc01] , LinkedIn [https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/about/] and TikTok. [https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc]
From the trail
https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/ [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/]
Michael had a fun weekend at San Diego Comic-Con, where he helped some talented artists promote a forthcoming graphic novel [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/] about his great-great-grandfather: Civil War hero and Recontruction-era Congressman Robert Smalls.
https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/ [https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/]
At a time when Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis are seeking to rewrite our nation's history [https://www.msnbc.com/the-reidout/reidout-blog/ron-desantis-florida-slavery-curriculum-rcna96052] — exploiting partisan divides at the expense of our children's education — Michael believes it's more important than ever for leaders to embrace the totality of America's legacy.
https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/ [https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/]
Part of that important work is elevating the stories of lesser-known patriots like Robert Smalls, who — in the face of unfathomable hardship — never stopped working to make America a more perfect Union [https://www.nps.gov/people/robert-smalls.htm] .
Michael is proud to be seeking the same House seat that his great-great-grandfather held nearly 140 years ago.

The story specifically highlighted the SC-01 racial gerrymandering case that will soon come before the Supreme Court [] . Per POLITICO: "It's impossible to know how many seats could become competitive, but the party is hoping a handful may come into play and that new maps could even threaten the likes of ... Nancy Mace." [] Roll Call [] Roll Call [] ran a story explaining how new congressional maps "could be drawn in time to change the electoral landscape in 2024, when Democrats need a net gain of just five seats to take control of the House." According to Roll Call, the SC-01 Supreme Court case "may also impact the federal redistricting litigation in Florida, which involves similar racial gerrymandering claims." [] Charleston City Paper [] And back home in the Lowcountry, the Charleston City Paper [] published an editorial calling on the Supreme Court to redraw the lines of SC-01 — so that the map "reflects the true electoral nature of our lower coast, not a district that the GOP bleached by moving thousands of Black voters to other districts." On the picket line [] Union of Southern Service Workers [] Michael expressed solidarity with the workers of the Waffle House on Garners Ferry Road in Columbia, South Carolina, who began a three-day strike [] on this month after delivering to management their petition to organize. As a business executive with nearly four decades of private sector experience — including several years as a leader in South Carolina's food industry — Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout any organization deserve fair pay and safe working conditions. Nancy Mace [] Nancy Mace attended a POLITICO event [] last week, where she warned that Republicans need to refocus on "child care, maternal care, prenatal care [and] abortion" if they want to keep control of the House. It was more cheap talk from Mace, who — time and again — has flip-flopped on the issues that matter most to women and working families. = [=] The Guardian [] Here are the facts: In 2019, Nancy Mace voted for a six-week abortion ban [] in the South Carolina legislature. In 2021, she voted against the expansion of the child tax credit [] in the American Rescue Plan. In January, she co-sponsored H.R. 7 [] , which would make health coverage that includes reproductive care ineligible for federal funding. In July, she voted for an NDAA amendment that makes it harder for servicewomen to access health care [] — a policy she herself called an "asshole move." name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=775c84b6c6fb459d97f23ffd4498ac9a&_e=tgt4LkV58wNguqHb1yYirw7ECih_HEL1lAQHPwlulbzwGnfJBze6je3Bg1qK_FJQev17aAe85KRNupD34OeGPOCchY2cqCTncU96yHp95zBDECQALVuUO1g7SgcajfBlLl17TuYpLKX5FAiOAxfvMInkIDnDoCyCKnRb0j3snJgX1f0UfH2IYVhVCxXjkWZCr9_GMq9EISlChh7kuF2a79ioFOra2AFyB41ReCbJDom-lXvZkNIwvdkdukpZmrrgMhubmXeBDEWvXDfDmzDSJqO9c4LvTDbZU5oEpqCdaBrQR-eWvnY1rBCbYQuqElj6RAniguEa_hQx9b51XQsNmWb9nZZHl2V6HiMLCZ1hFJMJhHv1d49gkl0t08ZDV7cSjKMzLimd6fDm7Xky_3im1g%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=775c84b6c6fb459d97f23ffd4498ac9a&_e=tgt4LkV58wNguqHb1yYirw7ECih_HEL1lAQHPwlulbzwGnfJBze6je3Bg1qK_FJQev17aAe85KRNupD34OeGPOCchY2cqCTncU96yHp95zBDECQALVuUO1g7SgcajfBlLl17TuYpLKX5FAiOAxfvMInkIDnDoCyCKnRb0j3snJgX1f0UfH2IYVhVCxXjkWZCr9_GMq9EISlChh7kuF2a79ioFOra2AFyB41ReCbJDom-lXvZkNIwvdkdukpZmrrgB0P-aGNWTykP7ZFptEs9xjj6i3MyJpbhVTgNcJ63WJRFSanxo3-Hfj_IGZ8hHCq-qLzj21Yru5HHdedpRcGyDAYmQntkdHdfjsbpQQbSiDnN_qGduAsEeurx_yixWoazzSnk1LsQfoLUEBglUquSlQ%3D%3D)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=775c84b6c6fb459d97f23ffd4498ac9a&_e=tgt4LkV58wNguqHb1yYirw7ECih_HEL1lAQHPwlulbzwGnfJBze6je3Bg1qK_FJQev17aAe85KRNupD34OeGPOCchY2cqCTncU96yHp95zBDECQALVuUO1g7SgcajfBlLl17TuYpLKX5FAiOAxfvMInkIDnDoCyCKnRb0j3snJgX1f0UfH2IYVhVCxXjkWZCr9_GMq9EISlChh7kuF2a79ioFOra2AFyB41ReCbJDom-lXvZkNIwvdkdukpZmrrg-EvYj-v5QbhwmMSAHh4EK-l7wy_lViA5WAtxxuhNUfBsw71YENj-xGH7Ymy6-BwrpaxIMaOcFdo27XaiPDIdgQHA4MWKmTzVeqrP8GukZjpeJJ0y0W93p75V8g5HEFs63AwJ_51NaAOATSoVx02L_A%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed. But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees." The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake ... ...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We’ve hit a nerve
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsj9VvUDiN

Vivek 2024

It's clear that the establishment is worried about the
campaign we're running.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osj9VvUDiN

Fellow American - the DC
Establishment is coming after me.

FIRST: Chris Christie was on
MSNBC to attack me and then went on Fox News calling me
"dangerous."

THEN: Nikki Haley attacked me,
mischaracterizing my stance on Israel.

NOW: Mike Pence (after swinging
and missing on the debate stage) is fundraising using a video of
me as an 18-year-old questioning Al Sharpton. It's
clear that the establishment is worried about the campaign we're
running, Fellow American.
"Vivek Ramaswamy quickly emerged
Wednesday night as the punching bag in the first Republican
presidential debate, finding himself in the midst of nearly all
of the most fiery clashes."
- Politico 8/24/23 Fellow
American, I don't have a Super PAC making massive TV buys in New
Hampshire or Iowa. My campaign is run by YOU.

Will you help us fight back?

Chip in $10 ➔

Chip in $15 ➔

Chip in $24 ➔

Chip in $50 ➔

I won't ever back down from
speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream
media or establishment political class.

Help me stand up to the DC
Establishment today!

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

JOIN OUR MOVEMENT
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

name: Bob for Labor
subject: 1913 Women & Copper
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Together We Rise
,
As we usher in the celebration of Labor Day, let's celebrate some lesser-known history of the movement in our district.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
HELP ME FIGHT FOR WOKERS [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Growing up in a working-class union home, I understand the power of collective strength and the dignity earned through a hard day's work. I stand firm in my commitment to labor reform, livable wages, union protections, and collective bargaining rights.
Labor Day is not just a holiday, but a commemoration of the victories won by tireless advocates throughout history.
Labor Reform in MI01
In the early 20th century, amidst the tumult of the first labor movement, a pivotal event unfolded in our own backyard. When copper mines of the Upper Peninsula were exploiting their workers with dangerous conditions and pitiful wages, it was the brave men and women who formed unions and led strikes that ultimately led to the establishment of safer working conditions and fairer wages.
Their relentless fight laid the groundwork for many labor protections we enjoy today.
Read the 'Lost Labor Story'
》》》 drbob.me/LostLabor [https://ruralinsights.org/content/lost-labor-history-of-the-upper-peninsula/] 《《《
Women of the Movement
https://drbob.me/LaborJoanOfArc [https://drbob.me/LaborJoanOfArc]
Women were absolutely pivotal to our first labor movement in Michigan's First District. Anna Clemenc, seen here leading with the American flag marching through Calumet during the Copper Country Strike of 1913, was a fierce activist for the labor movement in Michigan.
Her activism in Northern Michigan and the UP helped change the tide for American workers across the country. She was considered the 'Joan of Arc of the Labor' in Michigan.
Read her story!
》》》 drbob.me/LaborJoanOfArc [drbob.me/LaborJoanOfArc] 《《《
This Labor Day, let's remember these courageous individuals and their stories of resilience.
Let's continue their fight in our pursuit of labor reform, ensuring every American worker receives a livable wage, safe working conditions, and the respect they deserve. I stand with our workers today, and every day, and pledge to continue advocating for their rights in Congress.
May we always remember the power of solidarity, the importance of our labor force, and the need to continue striving for better working conditions in every sector - from the mine to the mills, construction sites, factories, classrooms, hospitals, and coffee shops.
Happy Labor Day, for the union makes us strong.
In Solidarity,
Bob Lorinser

I stand with our workers today, and every day, and pledge to continue advocating for their rights in Congress. May we always remember the power of solidarity, the importance of our labor force, and the need to continue striving for better working conditions in every sector - from the mine to the mills, construction sites, factories, classrooms, hospitals, and coffee shops. Happy Labor Day, for the union makes us strong. In Solidarity, Bob Lorinser actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] if you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately. Our head-on approach is to augment yard sign efforts of political parties & issues groups with a groundswell of Ohioans who are fed up with the garbage being forced on us by progressives and elite, Uniparty, insiders of both major political parties in Ohio.

name: David Trone
subject: Workers are the backbone of our economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69169343/425311315/-273751907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGJkYWZhYS0xYzRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6n4yb0taCOkfdKfM4FreKjpchgveW9zUgPhOCFyi4A=&emci=6628ab8d-f548-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d4bdafaa-1c4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)
---
| |
---
Happy Labor Day, Peter! Workers are the backbone of the American economy. Having grown up in a working-class family, I understand success only means something if you give back. That’s why I’ve always made an effort to take care of my employees. In fact, back when I was running Total Wine, we established same-sex partner benefits long before it was popular. Employees can also take advantage of cost-free education benefits. In Congress, I strive to continue empowering Maryland’s workers. **I have a 100% pro-labor voting record** and am proud of how far the labor movement has come. As a U.S. Senator, I'd continue my track record of standing up for workers rights across Maryland and the U.S. This Labor Day, I want to make sure workers across the state know how much they’re appreciated. So, I’m asking personally: **[Will you show your appreciation for Maryland workers by filling out my team’s thank you card?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69169345/425311316/-273751907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGJkYWZhYS0xYzRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6n4yb0taCOkfdKfM4FreKjpchgveW9zUgPhOCFyi4A=&emci=6628ab8d-f548-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d4bdafaa-1c4b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)**

name: Tina Forsberg
subject: Please get in touch with us.
body:
Peter,

It has been a busy, if quiet summer as far as campaign communication goes. Team Castelli is gearing up for a fun fall full of events and updates.

To be sure you don't miss out, **_please click to this page to update your contact information: [https://join.castellifornc.com](https://join.castellifornc.com)_**

Look for our e-newsletter, the SITREP, to land in your inbox soon. As always, we would love to have your participation in the campaign. We have lots of options to work with the Colonel and myself, so reply back to let me know what you might be interested in doing. Being a team member on a congressional campaign is very interesting and exciting! Just reply back to me to get the dialogue started.

Enjoy the rest of your holiday weekend. We look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail and in the campaign office!

Tina Forsberg, Campaign Manager

[](http://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/emailsmalldollar)
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **tina@castellifornc.com**.

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: America doesn’t work without workers, period.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
Hi team – happy Labor Day!

Today, we celebrate and honor America’s remarkable workers, while also recognizing the many challenges they still face on the job and in this changing economy.

For decades, Americans have fought for safe working conditions and fair pay – and while we’ve made significant progress over the years, too many hard-working Pennsylvanians are struggling to make ends meet.

From union-busting tactics by some of our country’s largest employers, to our disturbingly low minimum wage, workers need pro-labor advocates in office now more than ever before.

Listen, here’s the truth: America doesn’t work without workers. As your next Attorney General, I’ll always stand up to protect and defend PA workers. I always have, I always will.

I hope you enjoy this important holiday, and join me in honoring the struggle and sacrifice of hard-working Pennsylvanians, past and present.

Happy Labor Day,

– Eugene

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Are you coming tonight Peter?
body:
RSVP ASAP

| | | |
---
**ATTN: Montgomery/Harris Counties**
**Tonight** will be a VERY important update for those of us who live in **SE Montgomery County** and **NE Harris County**.
This excerpt from the Center for Immigration Studies was shared with me earlier...
"_Texas massacre happened in America’s largest illegal immigrant city, Colony Ridge or Colonia, and media won’t say so._ _
__At least 50,000 illegal immigrants have changed once-rural East Texas near Houston for the worse.
Todd Bensman tells all in his book, 'Overrun: How Joe Biden Unleashed Greatest Border Crisis in U.S. History'._ _
Gulf/Sinaloa Cartels invested in Colony Ridge from earliest inception, financing lots for local operatives to run safe houses._ _
They then move smuggled drugs/people from border to interior America._ _
Before all this, crime mostly consisted of a few white country meth-heads, 2 local police investigators working in area said privately._ "
Tonight, Walter West will be updating us on:
* Illegal Aliens
* The Southern Border
* How "The Colonias" of Liberty and San Jacinto Counties affect YOU in Montgomery and Harris Counties

**I sent out the email below on Friday... this is your reminder:**
Every first and third Monday of each month, the Montgomery County Tea Party meets at Citizen Grill.
And on Monday, September 4, at 6:30 pm, Walter West joins us to give a **border update**.
He'll also discuss the **Colonia along the Liberty/Montgomery County border** and what it means for us here in MoCo.
Join us and bring some friends.
We will meet in the **air-conditioned** special events room inside Citizens Grill at 315 Enclave Drive, Conroe, TX.
Food and beverages will be available for purchase.
**Please RSVP below so that I can reserve a table**.
Try and arrive early to place your order before the meeting starts at 6:30 pm.
Seating will be limited.
As always, meetings are free and open to the public.
[RSVP HERE](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZmb3JtLmpvdGZvcm0uY29tJTJGMjMyNDM0NDIzOTk0MTU3&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis.activehosted.com&email=IG3VKJADN%2F%2F6QVbyTqD0yXkuyj8YUtRNLUpYh0NjboN9rZDa%3AmORdcTBOi2L0ljRL5SrWxjS%2FuCkMUopO&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=202A225A1A1765&sig=Btb3ktnKqidbEY7JJWJbb2rFeR4tEGLbP6HBsgGRCYuh&iat=1693849017)
_For Liberty,_

name: Congressman Chris Deluzio
subject: Today is about you, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Chris here, and I just wanted to take a moment to wish you a happy Labor Day. Today is about you, Derek, the labor movement, and our proud Western PA history.

Western PA is hallowed ground for the labor movement. We are the people who made the steel that built America. We’ve fought our country’s wars, cared for our young and sick, patrolled our streets, ran into the flames, drove the buses, built the roads and highways, and so much else. We’ve worked hard and sacrificed because that’s who we are. We love this country. These values are in our blood.

And today, on Labor Day, we all stand in solidarity with workers across this country and rededicate ourselves to the fight for dignity for all.

I'm running for reelection because the union way of life must be strong and workers in America need a better deal. Corporate jagoffs and the politicians who do their dirty work have been hurting folks around here for far too long. That must end.

As a guy who stood alongside the Steelworkers in the struggle for a union, I know these fights aren’t easy. Corrupt politicians and the mega corporations that fund them don't care about unions, workers, and working families. No more profits over people, no more screwing over workers, no more outsourcing jobs to China and all over the planet to squeeze out a few more pennies in profit on the backs of hard-working Americans. We should be making things in this country, we should be making them with union workers, and we should be making them right here in Western PA.

I'm committed to growing domestic manufacturing and the jobs that power it. We need to grow our economy from the middle out by investing in our workers and unions – not stock buybacks and bonuses for corporate bosses.

On Labor Day, I hope you’ll join me in committing to the fight for workers and against raw corporate power. Will you help me fight for workers' rights and hard-earned benefits here in Western PA? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=230904_cd_laborday_l1]

Chip in [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=230904_cd_laborday_b1]

Thank you for all that you do, Derek.

In solidarity,

– Chris Deluzio
Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country.
Will you join Chris' team and help keep PA-17 blue?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=d347e0f6-214b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=d347e0f6-214b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73]

Friends, Today is Labor Day! Today and every day, I'm proud to support the working-class fight for fair wages, good working conditions, and representation for all workers. **Unions built this country. Full stop.** _It's thanks to unions that we have a weekend, an 8-hour workday, child labor laws, and so much more._ **If you're hosting a picnic, get-together, shindig, or barbeque today, be sure to include some union-strong snacks.** Options include: Hot dogs: 🌭
* Ballpark
* Dearborn Sausage
* Foster Farms
* Hebrew National
* Oscar Mayer
* Kroger
* Koegel
* Boar's Head

Bread: 🍞
* Wonder Bread
* Stroehmann
* Alfred Nichols

Condiments: 🥫
* French's Mustard
* Heinz Ketchup
* Jack Daniel's BBQ sauce
* Vlasic pickles

Drinks: 🥤
* A&W Root Beer
* Coca-Cola products
* Ocean Spray fruit juice
* Canada Dry

Nothing tastes better than knowing your food was made by American workers who negotiated a fair deal with their employer. So from my household to yours: Happy Labor Day, Solidarity Forever, and I hope you have a union-strong day! Gratefully, Callie Callie Barr
Candidate for Congress in Michigan's First District | | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
Dear Friend,

Labor Day is a day that means so much to me personally, and as a Democrat.

I grew up in a working class family in Central Mass. My father was a union lineman and my mom was a receptionist at our local elementary school.

When my dad was locked out or on strike, times were tough. But his union provided for our family — they kept us fed and paid our bills until he was back at work.

Massachusetts has such a rich history in the labor movement that continues to this day. From groundbreaking worker protections to national leadership in the labor movement, our Commonwealth leads on labor.

Let’s not forget, the Democratic Party is the party of working people and retirees. We stand for fair wages, safe working conditions, and good benefits. We fight for justice, fairness, and equity. We will always put people before corporations.

Today, please join me in recognizing all who have come before us and those who continue the fight day in and day out. Let’s strive to protect the rights and security of working families everywhere.

Happy Labor Day!

In solidarity,
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: This Labor Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
My dedication to ensuring an equitable economy and protecting the rights of our workers remains unwavering
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69170057/425313429/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZjYzMyZjEtMjI0Yi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dz6O0WWTXTrx894CC0TaMcN0YY8EopztGGNS5iqdYp8=&emci=1b9203c4-1248-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=66cc32f1-224b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Happy Labor Day, Peter!

This day provides us not only with an opportunity to enjoy a well-deserved long weekend, but also time to reflect on the profound impact of the American labor movement that has shaped the very fabric of our society.

Today is about honoring those who fought for worker's rights for future generations, but it's also about recognizing the ensuing fight for our workers **today** , many of whom continue to push for safe and fair work environments.

It's crucial that we continue advocating for the well-being of our workforce — that's why I'm proud to have been a co-sponsor for the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, and will never stop fighting to raise the national minimum wage, paid family leave, and affordable healthcare.

**Peter, my dedication to ensuring an equitable economy and protecting the rights of our workers remains unwavering. Today, and every day, I hope you'll join me in celebrating the progress made by the American labor movement and recommit to continuing the fight for working people.**

Onward,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

clean_body: My dedication to ensuring an equitable economy and protecting the rights of our workers remains unwavering Happy Labor Day, Peter! This day provides us not only with an opportunity to enjoy a well-deserved long weekend, but also time to reflect on the profound impact of the American labor movement that has shaped the very fabric of our society. Today is about honoring those who fought for worker's rights for future generations, but it's also about recognizing the ensuing fight for our workers today , many of whom continue to push for safe and fair work environments. It's crucial that we continue advocating for the well-being of our workforce — that's why I'm proud to have been a co-sponsor for the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, and will never stop fighting to raise the national minimum wage, paid family leave, and affordable healthcare. Peter, my dedication to ensuring an equitable economy and protecting the rights of our workers remains unwavering. Today, and every day, I hope you'll join me in celebrating the progress made by the American labor movement and recommit to continuing the fight for working people. Onward, Derek Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

I've always been a fierce advocate for the protection and expansion of labor rights.

Right now, protecting American workers and strengthening their ability to organize in support of their collective interests and goals is more urgent than ever.

As our economy exploits hard-working Americans, we must renew our fight for policies that respect the dignity of their work.

The American labor movement strengthens the economy for all, raising the standard of living for our people through heroic action and steadfast nerve. So, today we honor hard-fought progress this Labor Day; tomorrow we continue our fight for an economy that works for us all.

Fighting for you,

Marcy Kaptur
---

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Workers first, always.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DAN KILDEE
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69170200/425313726/972226503?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTQxNWExNS0yMzRiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elEjyo_ovKzqd9bhZk15wJdRySKWVebVnlmLzFaDA9Q=) Hey team – Happy Labor Day! Today, I want to take a moment to reflect on and thank the workers who helped build the middle class, fought for safe working conditions, and stood up for fair wages. **Workers have supported and uplifted Michigan for decades** – and for that, I’m eternally grateful. Labor has a special history here in Michigan. I’m particularly proud to represent Flint, home of the Sit Down Strikes of 1936-1937, which led to the recognition of the United Auto Workers union. Throughout the history of our state, **workers and labor unions have been on the front lines of making Michigan a better place to live and work.** In Congress, I’ve honored that legacy by fighting for pro-labor policies that uplift workers in every corner of our state. Whether it’s by expanding good-paying union jobs or defending workers from unsafe conditions, **I’m proud to put Michigan workers first in everything I do.** But I also know our work isn’t finished – and with corporations trying to lower wages or bust unions, **hard-working Michiganders need pro-labor advocates in Congress more than ever before.** I hope you’ll take a minute to reflect on the progress workers have made in the past, and continue to support the workers who are fighting for fairness today. Enjoy your holiday! – Dan

---
| This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://go.dankildee.com/p/GtS1XDhiKEaKvsmtIZ8RfQ2?unsubscribedata=fccMvR3lLL61kHgY8Rs7Vf4c1qobKt06PKK0S%2BQaYfBFM0ITfjV3INGAGMJbhJyoT27pYhV8RZwkGlpvCmoew8GuTTeAZHWlWvgNX%2B1%2B1WIJoSLOlAXRvt2KuJ1RtmKKaAEvXGZrN0EL9K3rsholxCBZ%2BXh5GdSG8nyzTmm4pw2vF8TLteIjIg6D4zHFALanhaqJApVp%2FE2U69eWjrZ3S%2B%2BVYlfzcy6htAtA5B%2FR8h9m04NV0x%2FOvIpITw8YgwdlbHic64xZOTR9QLTnobUfRAplH4mUT1qvomNMqQIUuwoHnKWb6BCoKJBFsgQA04OfjhAViokiPbdz3AEoeVnF9AInum%2F6Ptksy7pvbBTJha3A%2Ftg6DWMvxyJ23CLAAr%2FzkzdpO3vTcLhQeRPX%2Bpo6h6KluA5kD1i0jq5Ghed%2FRfuA3Udfuo8v91P4oR%2F38lha).**

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8fc81f68efadb9270c98b20b2649863d2500108c6a5dd54df455a7c980fb07c0de253ab7e4dcec9a5844e7eec93dced7909bf76d068e3e68

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

- Record tax relief
- ESG prohibitions
- Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
- The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
- Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
- Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
- Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
- Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
- The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
- Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
- Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Labor made today happen 🛠️
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hey Peter, I’ll be quick.
Just a few lines here to recognize America’s labor movement.
There’s a reason they’re more popular than ever (and if you don’t believe me, [**check out this polling data**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2293?t=1&akid=1108%2E734936%2EmmAxEr)).
They gave us weekends. Breaks. Sick days. Workplace protections. Collective bargaining power. Hell, labor made today happen.
So take a minute today and join me in honoring our unions — [**and then add your name and call for more protections for workers nationwide.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/support_our_workers/?source=em230904-1-f&refcode2=1108.734936.mmAxEr&akid=1108%2E734936%2EmmAxEr)
[SUPPORT OUR UNIONS](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/support_our_workers/?source=em230904-1-f&refcode2=1108.734936.mmAxEr&akid=1108%2E734936%2EmmAxEr)
Alright, enough from me. Hope you’re enjoying the day.
-Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Seth
subject: Happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=%2Bh0R3pM9b4okdYo8CnR%2BchWq%2FXjOxTpvkWCgbQ6qXQT7i4nAh999EywgtkfM1KOzXATEcLhwBOEsNZSRCINbxok901xdLoYohk6FJ4qazUMwrJM4fLgACbi7G8OOwFne1G4V9M7dEupXWm6ZUZbP892DScSDYm%2FHpolZDyJxJwxD3MOqZuPbXCutG0vkPEOvCDF0uu6CuoFZS9zC07lwJGxOMh3oYE57nx2W2il05HXmL%2FrdYdJ8RaptWX%2FXMOjFCcnLxZmrSiaLtkK%2BKveNWyvF9LKpeLUu0SNEI%2FPhYVfpIoD%2BdO%2BpSn0moiXtIA1jsFSy%2BjpbVBPL1aI%2B9f5C6tdgabscdwBoSapKcjobY1DZA8neEs1CO4T4EHtl%2FQSFdF%2BevfBpgrEqVheRoITtbdorwsw4oeh7ADJuM%2BPTKLEt%2FClUsy%2Bfs%2Fmfr1HsV3RX)
---
| |
---
Peter,

First off, I just wanted to take a moment to wish you a Happy Labor Day. Today, we celebrate everything the labor movement has fought for and the working people of this country, who are truly the backbone of society.

Today, let us honor the workers who organized to improve conditions for people across the country, from the 40 hour work week to minimum wage. We must continue to fight for workers’ rights to organize, supporting unions that help to grow the middle class and secure better wages, benefits, and working conditions for Rhode Islanders and people across the country.

We have seen many important victories this year. In Rhode Island, wage theft is now a felony, protecting the rightful earnings of working people. New fair contracts have been won both in Rhode Island and nationally, but work remains, and I strongly support a fair resolution for SAG, WGA, and UAW workers who are seeking new agreements.

So this Labor Day, please join me in honoring the accomplishments of the workers who came before us, and towards continuing the fight for working people.

Have a happy and safe Labor Day,

Seth

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Investing in our unions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Happy Labor Day, Derek! Today is a day to celebrate American workers, honor organized labor’s hard-fought victories in the past, and recommit ourselves to the work ahead to make Pennsylvania a place where the doors of opportunity are open to everyone. For centuries, Pennsylvania workers have fought for fairer wages and better conditions – and I’m thrilled with the progress we’ve made so far to invest in workforce training programs and ensure our unions have the skilled workforce they need. As long as I’m your Governor, Pennsylvania will never be a right to work state. **But there’s still work to be done.** From creating more good-paying union jobs to making it easier for workers to raise a family and have a successful career, I will never stop fighting to guarantee every Pennsylvanian has access to real freedom and real opportunity. As Governor, you can count on me to fight for unions and working families every single day. I hope you have a restful holiday – I’m thankful to have your support. – Josh

clean_body: Happy Labor Day, Derek! Today is a day to celebrate American workers, honor organized labor’s hard-fought victories in the past, and recommit ourselves to the work ahead to make Pennsylvania a place where the doors of opportunity are open to everyone. For centuries, Pennsylvania workers have fought for fairer wages and better conditions – and I’m thrilled with the progress we’ve made so far to invest in workforce training programs and ensure our unions have the skilled workforce they need. As long as I’m your Governor, Pennsylvania will never be a right to work state. But there’s still work to be done. From creating more good-paying union jobs to making it easier for workers to raise a family and have a successful career, I will never stop fighting to guarantee every Pennsylvanian has access to real freedom and real opportunity. As Governor, you can count on me to fight for unions and working families every single day. I hope you have a restful holiday – I’m thankful to have your support. – Josh | | | = Text JOSH to 32210 By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. name: Katie Porter
subject: Standing with workers today and every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m up early before heading to Los Angeles, where I’ll be spending Labor Day with striking SEIU healthcare workers.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29302%2E3422442%2E8VyR0_)
Good morning! I’m up early before heading to Los Angeles, where I’ll be spending Labor Day with SEIU healthcare workers as they advocate for proper compensation and safety and support on the job.
Strong unions benefit all of us. As a consumer protection attorney, I’ve seen how union workers push for better safety guidelines in places like hospitals and airplanes. And as a champion for effective government oversight, I’m thankful for our union partners. **Unionized workers are often the folks on the ground sounding the alarm and holding big companies accountable when they sacrifice safety for profit.**
Here in California and across the country we’ve seen a summer full of strikes. As I’ve said on picket lines time and time again: **No matter the industry, workers deserve to share in the profits they create, and changing technology can’t be an excuse to bust unions and leave workers behind.**
On Labor Day and everyday, I’ll always fight for workers. Thanks for being in this fight!
Onward,
Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=2&akid=29302%2E3422442%2E8VyR0_)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: The Labor Movement is OUR movement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today is about honoring the countless labor rights activists before us. It’s also about continuing the struggle for worker political power.
Happy Labor Day, team.

Today, we recognize the ongoing struggle for labor rights in our country, and the countless union organizers and activists who fought tirelessly for them—often in the face of violent resistance.

Growing up poor and watching my mom and grandparents work around the clock just to scrape by, the Labor Movement is personal to me. I will always stand arm in arm with every worker, union, and labor organizer to advance higher wages, better working conditions, and an economy that benefits the many over the few.

Today, I stand in solidarity with the Labor Movement as we **continue building political power for working people** to ensure everyone has the right to live a life with purpose and dignity.

Despite sweeping attacks on unions and organized labor by an anti-worker Republican Party, union support has reached a historic high. Over 71% of Americans, Republicans and Independents included, are in support of unions, while nine in 10 Democrats and people under 30 view unions favorably.

Organizing for rights in the workplace is happening right now, and it’s not just happening in factories or construction sites. Workers in law offices, fast food restaurants, retail stores, and local coffee shops are all using their power to demand dignity and respect at every level in the workplace.

Unions and the Labor Movement are our frontline defense against low wages, unsafe working conditions, rising inequality, discrimination, and oppression in all its forms. Nothing is a more powerful force for progress than workers linking arms in solidarity.

I owe my campaign to the countless labor organizers and activists before me, and vow to continue the fight for labor and worker dignity now and always.

Wishing you a happy and safe Labor Day.

In solidarity,

Mondaire
